channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Record Store Day 2025: the full list, plus 5 great albums you need to bag on April 12
item.description: Record Store Day 2025 promises tons of unmissable music for every kind of music fan –here are my picks.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Google Cloud Next '25: What to Expect
item.description: Get ready for the latest advancements in Google Cloud Platform and cloud computing at Google Cloud Next '25, happening April 9-11 in Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: An AI avatar tried to argue a case before a New York court. The judges weren't having it
item.description: A man appearing before a New York court got a scolding from a judge after he tried to use an avatar generated by artificial intelligence to argue his case.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nearly half of National Weather Service offices have 20% vacancy rates, and experts say it's a risk
item.description: Data obtained by The Associated Press shows that close to half of the local National Weather Service forecast offices have 20% vacancy rates as severe weather chugs across the nation’s heartland.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ivanti warns customers of new critical flaw exploited in the wild
item.description: Ivanti is warning customers that a critical vulnerability that impacts its VPN appliances and other products has already been exploited in the wild by a Chinese APT group.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Microsoft's AI division head wants to create a lasting relationship between chatbots and their users
item.description: Fifty years after the founding of Microsoft, the CEO of its artificial intelligence division has a big task: develop a new product line as integral to daily life as the software giant’s past innovations.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How internet search algorithms could help critical infrastructure
item.description: Researchers found the algorithms that rank pages in internet searches also can help planners understand how to prevent failures in electrical systems. The post How internet search algorithms could help critical infrastructure first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: AI vs. pro gambler's $1 million March Madness bet coming down to Duke and Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The $1 million March Madness wager between a pro gambler and an artificial-intelligence site will be decided by the winner of the Duke-Houston game in the Final Four. The Vegas bookies project the gambler, who picked 5 1/2-point favorite Duke, should win.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Increasingly dangerous scam targets kids through sextortion
item.description: The FBI issued a report that described sextortion as “a growing threat,” noting that the agency investigated roughly 1,000 cases a month for much of 2021 through early 2023.
item.dc:creator: Andre Mouchard, The Mercury News

item.title: Anthropic’s and OpenAI’s new AI education initiatives offer hope for enterprise knowledge retention
item.description: Two of the biggest names in artificial intelligence are independently developing new AI tools that encourage learning, at a time when the technology has been criticized for dumbing down smart users in the enterprise and discouraging critical thinking.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Dr Arvind Gupta: Trustworthy systems to empower India’s growing economy
item.description: Digital India Foundation, a policy think tank working in the areas of technology policy, digital inclusion, ethics of AI, supply-chain security, and governance of critical and emerging technologies. Dr.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TikTok Shuts Down TikTok Notes, Focuses on Lemon8
item.description: TikTok is shutting down its photo-sharing app, TikTok Notes, and focusing on Lemon8 instead. Find out why...
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Tariff war throws building of data centers into disarray
item.description: Enterprise IT leaders are facing a double-whammy of uncertainties complicating their data center building decisions: The ever-changing realities of genAI strategies, and the back-and-forth nature of the current tariff wars pushed by the United States. “This is obviously a fluid situation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Musk will remain 'a friend and an adviser' to Trump after leaving DOGE: Vance
item.description: Vice President Vance said Thursday that billionaire Elon Musk will remain a “friend and an adviser” to the White House after Musk departs from his role as a special government employee next month.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Accelerate cloud infrastructure initiatives with Lucid Software
item.description: Cloud and development operations (devops) teams are under constant pressure to do more, faster. They have outdated systems to update and manage, new systems to build, and requests from business units who need their support. It’s a velocity problem, and IT departments often struggle to keep pace.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Humanoid robot stuns with perfect side-flip acrobatics
item.description: Unitree, a Chinese robotics company that developed a backflipping robot, has now introduced a humanoid robot capable of doing a side flip.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: Coverage of Nvidia GTC 2025 With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: GenAI is already transforming the healthcare industry
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) is quickly transforming healthcare, according to a survey by consultancy McKinsey & Co. released today. The survey of 150 healthcare industry organizations found 85% are exploring or had already adopted genAI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google adds end-to-end email encryption to Gmail
item.description: Google has introduced a new end-to-end encryption (E2EE) feature in Gmail, enabling organizations to send encrypted emails that even Google cannot read to other Gmail users.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Linux Foundation Networking shares new AI projects, milestone releases
item.description: The Linux Foundation’s networking division (LF Networking) is continuing to grow both its mandate and project roster in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google’s new AI tech may know when your house will burn down
item.description: FireSat is a satellite project designed to detect and track wildfires early, aiming to detect a fire that's the size of a classroom within 20 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation
